# 01-eth-commerce Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-06

## Active Technologies

- Solidity ^0.8.20 (smart contracts), TypeScript 5.x (frontends) + OpenZeppelin Contracts (ERC20, Ownable, ReentrancyGuard), Foundry/Forge (SC dev/test), Next.js 15 (App Router), Ethers.js v6, Stripe SDK, Tailwind CSS (001-eth-ecommerce-dapp)

## Project Structure

```text
backend/
frontend/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test && npm run lint

## Code Style

Solidity ^0.8.20 (smart contracts), TypeScript 5.x (frontends): Follow standard conventions
